name: Sync Engine
description: Bidirectional offline-first sync between SQLite and Supabase with last-write-wins conflict resolution and soft-delete awareness
current_phase: S751: Release-proof sweep complete. Global full sync, dirty-scope isolation, private-channel register/teardown, and the final mixed-flow soak are now live-proven on Windows + S21. SyncHintRemoteEmitter owns push-side emit_sync_hint(...), RealtimeHintHandler owns private-channel subscription/consume, and sync_hint_subscriptions is the active-channel source of truth. Current focus is artifact closeout and any optional non-blocking harness cleanup.
constraints_summary: Last-write-wins conflict resolution ONLY (no merge attempts)
Bidirectional sync (push and pull in same cycle)
Sync owners are explicit: SyncCoordinator at the application edge, SupabaseSync for remote row I/O, LocalSyncStore for SQLite row I/O
Push-side foreground invalidation must flow through SyncHintRemoteEmitter -> emit_sync_hint(...)
RealtimeHintHandler is the only client owner of register_sync_hint_channel, deactivate_sync_hint_channel, and sync_hint broadcast subscription
sync_hint_subscriptions is the active private-channel source of truth
RealtimeHintHandler must normalize nested private-broadcast envelopes before deriving dirty scopes
Client Dart must not call raw /realtime/v1/api/broadcast
Max 3 retry attempts per operation with exponential backoff (5s/10s/20s)
Soft-delete tables must preserve tombstone payloads on local purge; local hard delete must not silently escalate to remote physical delete
Edit-wins conflict resolution: if updated_at > deleted_at, record is restored
RLS SELECT policies do NOT filter deleted_at (sync needs visibility); client-side filtering only
30-day purge: SoftDeleteService.purgeExpiredRecords() runs after sync + on app startup
sync_status is LOCAL-ONLY: never push to Supabase, force 'synced' on all pull payloads
